"[144] ^CT650 -- THE CT651 CREW WILL MOVING/REPLACING THE EB 8/KITCHEN CREEK CLSR BACK TO BUCKMAN SPRINGS / ONCE THE NEW CLSR IS IN PLACE, EB 8 TRFC WILL BE DIVERTED OFF FWY TO BUCKMAN SPRINGS, WHERE TRFC CAN TRAVEL SB BUCKMAN SPRINGS TO SR-94, THEN HEAD EB SR-94 TO THE I-8 [Shared]"

"[134] 1039 PSDS OFC TO NOTIFY ENTAC [Shared]"

"[127] ^CT650 -- FIRE HAS JUMPED I-8 FWY AND IS NOW BURNING SOUTH OF THE 8 // SOUNDS LIKE CORDS IS SETTING UP CLSR OF OLD HWY 80 BTWN LA POSTA and CRESTWOOD; ALSO SOUNDS LIKE CORDS IS STILL WORKING W/ DETOURED I-8 TRFC TO ALLOW RE-ENTRY TO WB 8 FROM OLD HWY 80, BUT WEST OF THERE, TRFC WILL NOT BE ALLOWED ON OLD HWY 80 HEADED TOWARD LA POSTA [Shared]"

"[116] ^CT650 -- 1097 // CONFIRMED THE FOLLOWING CLSRS: EB 8 IS CLOSED AT KITCHEN CREEK/CAMERON; WB 8 IS CLOSED AS SR-94/RIBBONWOOD (TRFC CAN USE SB RIBBONWOOD, TO WB OLD HWY 80, THEN RE-ENTER WB 8 FROM OLD HWY 80) [Shared]"
